  • Classes in at.jku.se.smarthome.service.api used by at.jku.se.smarthome.service.api
    Class
    Description
    EnergyService
    Defines operations for calculating and querying energy consumption data.
    IoTIntegrationService.DeviceStateChangeListener
    Callback interface for device state changes received from the broker.
    IoTIntegrationService.IoTConfiguration
    Configuration record for MQTT broker settings.
    LogService
    Defines operations for recording and querying activity log entries.
    NotificationService
    Service interface for managing in-app notifications.
    RoomService
    Defines operations for managing rooms and devices within the smart-home system.
    RuleService
    Defines operations for managing automation rules in the smart-home system.
    SceneService
    Defines operations for managing scenes in the smart-home system.
    ScheduleService
    Defines the scheduling operations exposed to the smart-home UI and services.
    UserService
    Abstract base service for user authentication and management.
    UserService.LoginStatus
    Login/authentication status outcomes.
    UserService.RegistrationStatus
    Registration status outcomes.

    Description

    Defines operations for calculating and querying energy consumption data.

    Defines operations for optional MQTT integration with physical IoT devices.

    Callback interface for device state changes received from the broker.
